title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: Kalshi, founded by Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara, built a regulated financial exchange for real-world event contracts. After four years of regulatory battles including litigation against government overseers, the company achieved a $22 billion valuation and scaled to millions of customers and billions in trading volume.
